0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Hybrid Search"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's flagship retrieval capability — combining dense vector similarity with SQLite FTS5 full-text search for results that are both semantically relevant and precisely matched."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Why Hybrid?"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Approach"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Strengths"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Weaknesses"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Semantic similarity, fuzzy matching"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Misses exact terms, no boolean logic"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Text only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Exact matching, boolean queries"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No semantic understanding, synonym blind"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hybrid"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Best of both"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Slightly higher latency"}]}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Fusion Algorithm"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," method performs hybrid search using a ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"configurable"}]," scoring formula with tunable weights:"]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Step 1: Weighted combination of scores (weights default to 50/30/20)\nbase_score = (vector_score * vec_weight +\n           fts_score * fts_weight +\n           importance * importance_weight) / (vec_weight + fts_weight + importance_weight)\n\n# Step 2: Apply temporal recency boost\nfinal_score = base_score * (1.0 + temporal_weight * temporal_boost)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Default weights:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Vector"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_weight"}],"): 50.0 — semantic similarity via BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5, 384 dims"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"FTS5"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_weight"}],"): 30.0 — BM25 text relevance"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Importance"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance_weight"}],"): 20.0 — memory importance rating, 0.0–1.0"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporal"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_weight"}],"): 0.3 — controls how much recency decay influences the final score"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The recency decay uses an exponential half-life (",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_halflife"}],", default 24 hours)."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"All weights are configurable per-query — see usage examples below."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Usage"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\n# Default hybrid search — balanced 50/30/20 weights\nresults = mem.recall(\"What database does the project use?\", top_k=5)\n\nfor r in results:\n  print(f\"Score: {r['score']:.3f}\")\n  print(f\"  Content: {r['content'][:100]}\")\n  print(f\"  Source: {r['source']}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Tuning Retrieval Weights"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Override the default weights per query to match your use case:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Boost exact text matching for error codes, identifiers\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"error code E501 in linter\",\n  vec_weight=20.0,\n  fts_weight=60.0,\n  importance_weight=20.0,\n)\n\n# Maximize semantic similarity for conceptual queries\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"how does authentication work?\",\n  vec_weight=70.0,\n  fts_weight=20.0,\n  importance_weight=10.0,\n)\n\n# Emphasize recency for \"what happened lately\" queries\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"what did we discuss this week?\",\n  temporal_weight=0.6,\n  temporal_halflife=48.0,  # 48-hour half-life\n)\n\n# Point-in-time temporal query\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"decisions from January\",\n  query_time=\"2026-01-31T23:59:59Z\",\n  temporal_weight=0.1,  # minimal recency bias\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La"],["$Lb"],"$Lc"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"zHG3ZR8juPPx4CXLmq1-_"}
4:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Result Format"}]
5:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"[\n  {\n      \"id\": \"mem_abc123\",\n      \"content\": \"We decided to use PostgreSQL for the primary database...\",\n      \"score\": 0.92,\n      \"source\": \"decision\",\n      \"importance\": 0.8,\n      \"created_at\": 1714060800,\n  },\n  ...\n]\n","language":"python"}]
6:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Working Memory Retrieval"}]
7:["$","p",null,{"children":"When searching Working Memory (recent, non-consolidated entries), a keyword-based fallback is used with different weights than the episodic formula. This handles the case where vector embeddings may not yet be available for very recent entries."}]
8:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Performance"}]
9:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Query Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Median Latency"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"p99 Latency"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"35ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"120ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"FTS5 only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"15ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"45ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Hybrid (default)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"65ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"180ms"}]]}]]}]]}]
a:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$Ld",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Index Requirements"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Hybrid search requires both vector and FTS5 indices to be built. These are created automatically on first use. Initial index build may take a few seconds for large datasets."}]}]]}]]}]}]
